company.name: Neuro Tank
company.mission: Neuro Tank builds AI-powered automation for businesses — WhatsApp bots, website AI assistants, lead generation, CRM automation, booking systems, and custom AI workflows. We help businesses reply instantly 24/7, capture more leads, and automate support.
company.stats: 1 Lakh+ conversations handled, 30+ businesses supported, under 3 second average response time, 24/7 availability.

chunks.content: Contact Neuro Tank: Email neurotank2.5@gmail.com | Phone +923451109384 | Location Lahore, Pakistan. Book a free consultation at /contact. We reply within 12 hours on business days.

Consultation process: 1) Submit the contact form or book via website. 2) Senior strategist replies within 12 hours. 3) Free 30-minute strategy call to map automations. 4) Fixed timeline and price within 48 hours. 5) Build and launch in 10–14 days for most projects.

Starter plan: $300/month or $3,000/year (save with annual). For solopreneurs and local shops. Includes: 1 AI chatbot (WhatsApp OR Website), trained on up to 50 pages/FAQs, lead capture to CRM/email, 2 integrations (Calendar + Sheets), email support with 48h response.

Growth plan (Most Popular): $1,200/month or $12,000/year. For scaling brands and agencies. Includes: up to 3 channels (Web + WhatsApp + Instagram), full website + catalog training, AI booking & calendar automation, CRM + 8 integrations, advanced analytics, priority support 12h response.

Enterprise plan: Custom pricing. For high-volume operations. Includes: unlimited channels and agents, voice AI sales agents (inbound + outbound), custom workflows and private models, dedicated solutions architect, on-prem/private cloud option, 99.99% SLA and 1h response.
WhatsApp AI Chatbots: Instant 24/7 replies on WhatsApp. Qualify leads, answer FAQs, send catalogs, book appointments in under 3 seconds. Multi-language, human handoff, full transcripts.
Website AI Assistants: AI concierge embedded on your site. Trained on your services, pricing, and brand voice. Captures qualified leads to CRM. Works on any website framework.
AI Appointment & Booking: End-to-end booking — checks availability, books appointments, sends reminders, reschedules. Connects Google Calendar, Calendly, and in-house systems.
AI Customer Support: Resolves ~80% of tickets automatically. Trained on your knowledge base. Handles returns, order status, troubleshooting. Escalates only when needed.
CRM Automation: Connect HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, GoHighLevel, Pipedrive, Airtable. Auto lead scoring, follow-ups, deal stages, email/SMS sequences.
Lead Generation Systems: AI outbound — cold email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp outreach. Personalized at scale. Inbox warming and deliverability included.
AI Sales Agents: Voice and chat agents that qualify, demo, handle objections, and book meetings. Trained on your top closer's playbooks.
Custom AI Automation: Bespoke AI stack for your unique workflow — document processing, internal copilots, end-to-end automations. Full ownership, no lock-in.
Web Solutions: High-performance business websites and web apps. SEO-ready, fast, lead capture, optional AI chat built in.
AI Solutions: End-to-end AI systems — chatbots, voice agents, workflow automation, custom models. Strategy, build, and deployment in one team.
App Solutions: iOS and Android apps with optional in-app AI support and booking.
Product Solutions: Concept to MVP to market — SaaS, dashboards, customer platforms.
Business Solutions: Unify operations, sales, support, marketing with automation, dashboards, and AI.
Industries we serve: Restaurants, Real Estate, Clinics, Salons & Spas, Hotels, E-commerce, Education, and Agencies. Each has a tailored AI playbook.
Timeline: Most clients live in 10–14 days. Simple WhatsApp bots in 72 hours. Complex multi-channel systems 3–4 weeks. Fixed timeline shared after consultation.
Integrations: HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, GoHighLevel, Pipedrive, Notion, Airtable, Google/Outlook Calendar, Stripe, Shopify, WooCommerce, 40+ more. Custom integrations on request.
Channels supported: WhatsApp, Instagram DMs, Messenger, website chat, Telegram, email, voice/phone, SMS.
Security: Data encrypted in transit and at rest. SOC 2 compliant workflows. GDPR and HIPAA-aware setups on Enterprise. Private cloud option available.
Billing: No long-term lock-in. Month-to-month or annual (discounted). Cancel anytime. You own your data, knowledge base, and workflows.
No technical knowledge needed. We handle design, training, integration, and optimization. You get a dashboard and dedicated success manager.
AI is trained on your brand voice, FAQs, product catalog, and scripts so it sounds like your best team member.
If AI cannot answer, it escalates to your team via Slack/Email/WhatsApp with full transcript. We retrain weekly from gaps.
How it works: Step 1 Consultation (48h plan). Step 2 AI Development (1–2 weeks). Step 3 Integration (3–5 days). Step 4 Automation Launch (ongoing optimization).

refusalMessage: I am only trained to answer questions related to our company, services, pricing, and automation solutions. For other topics, please contact our team at neurotank2.5@gmail.com or visit /contact to book a consultation.
fallbackMessage: Please contact our team for more information. Email: neurotank2.5@gmail.com | Phone: +923451109384 | Book at /contact.
